pinyin: qiān lǐ zhī xíng, shǐ yú zú xià
translation: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

chinese: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆
pinyin: xué ér bù sī zé wǎng, sī ér bù xué zé dài
translation: Learning without thought is labor lost; thought without learning is perilous.

pinyin: bù jī kuǐ bù, wú yǐ zhì qiān lǐ
translation: Without accumulating small steps, one cannot reach a thousand miles.

pinyin: yǒu zhì zhě shì jìng chéng
translation: Where there is a will, there is a way.

pinyin: zhī jǐ zhī bǐ, bǎi zhàn bù dài
translation: Know yourself and know your enemy, and you will never be defeated.

chinese: 工欲善其事，必先利其器
pinyin: gōng yù shàn qí shì, bì xiān lì qí qì
translation: A craftsman must first sharpen his tools to do his work well.

pinyin: sān rén xíng, bì yǒu wǒ shī
translation: Among three people walking, I will find my teacher.

pinyin: shuǐ dī shí chuān
translation: Dripping water pierces stone.

pinyin: yù sù zé bù dá
translation: Haste makes waste.

pinyin: bǎi wén bù rú yī jiàn
translation: Seeing once is better than hearing a hundred times.

pinyin: shī bài nǎi chéng gōng zhī mǔ
translation: Failure is the mother of success.

chinese: 路遥知马力，日久见人心
pinyin: lù yáo zhī mǎ lì, rì jiǔ jiàn rén xīn
translation: Distance tests a horse's strength; time reveals a person's heart.

pinyin: tiān shēng wǒ cái bì yǒu yòng
translation: Heaven has endowed me with talents that must be of use.

pinyin: qīng chū yú lán ér shèng yú lán
translation: The student surpasses the master.

pinyin: bù dào cháng chéng fēi hǎo hàn
translation: One who has never been to the Great Wall is not a true hero.

chinese: 有朋自远方来，不亦乐乎
pinyin: yǒu péng zì yuǎn fāng lái, bù yì lè hū
translation: Is it not a joy to have friends come from afar?

pinyin: shān bù zài gāo, yǒu xiān zé míng
translation: A mountain is famous not for its height, but for the immortals who dwell there.

pinyin: yī cùn guāng yīn yī cùn jīn
translation: An inch of time is an inch of gold.

pinyin: xīn jí chī bù liǎo rè dòu fǔ
translation: Impatience will not let you eat hot tofu.

pinyin: shí shì qiú shì
translation: Seek truth from facts.

pinyin: wàn shì kāi tóu nán
translation: The beginning of all things is difficult.

pinyin: rù xiāng suí sú
translation: When in Rome, do as the Romans do.

pinyin: yī rì wéi shī, zhōng shēn wéi fù
translation: A teacher for a day is a father for a lifetime.

chinese: 只要功夫深，铁杆磨成针
pinyin: zhǐ yào gōng fu shēn, tiě gǎn mó chéng zhēn
translation: With enough effort, an iron rod can be ground into a needle.

pinyin: rén wú yuǎn lǜ, bì yǒu jìn yōu
translation: He who does not plan for the future will find trouble at his doorstep.

pinyin: chǐ yǒu suǒ duǎn, cùn yǒu suǒ cháng
translation: Everyone has strengths and weaknesses.

pinyin: bù jīng yī shì, bù zhǎng yī zhì
translation: One cannot grow in wisdom without experiencing hardship.

pinyin: yī yán jì chū, sì mǎ nán zhuī
translation: Once a word leaves your mouth, even four horses cannot chase it back.

pinyin: dà zhì ruò yú
translation: Great wisdom appears as foolishness.

pinyin: shàng shàn ruò shuǐ
translation: The highest goodness is like water.

pinyin: dào kě dào, fēi cháng dào
translation: The Tao that can be spoken is not the eternal Tao.

pinyin: tiān xià méi yǒu bù sàn de yán xí
translation: There is no banquet under heaven that does not end.

pinyin: liú shuǐ bù fǔ, hù shū bù dù
translation: Running water does not rot; a door hinge does not rust.

chinese: 留得青山在，不愁没柴烧
pinyin: liú dé qīng shān zài, bù chóu méi chái shāo
translation: As long as the green hills remain, there is no need to worry about firewood.

pinyin: chī yī qiàn, zhǎng yī zhì
translation: A fall into a pit, a gain in your wit.

pinyin: xiào yī xiào, shí nián shào
translation: A smile makes you ten years younger.

pinyin: jìn zhū zhě chì, jìn mò zhě hēi
translation: You become like your companions.

pinyin: bù pà màn, jiù pà zhàn
translation: Don't fear going slowly, only fear standing still.

pinyin: jīn wú zú chì, rén wú wán rén
translation: Gold cannot be pure, and people cannot be perfect.

pinyin: shí nián shù mù, bǎi nián shù rén
translation: It takes ten years to grow a tree, a hundred years to cultivate a person.

pinyin: xiá lù xiāng féng yǒng zhě shèng
translation: On a narrow road, the brave one wins.

pinyin: zhèng rén xiān zhèng jǐ
translation: Before correcting others, first correct yourself.

pinyin: dú wàn juǎn shū, xíng wàn lǐ lù
translation: Read ten thousand books, travel ten thousand miles.

pinyin: qián shì bù wàng, hòu shì zhī shī
translation: Past experience is a guide for the future.

pinyin: zhī zú zhě cháng lè
translation: He who is content is always happy.

pinyin: yǐ hé wéi guì
translation: Harmony is to be treasured.

pinyin: jiàn xián sī qí yān
translation: When you see a worthy person, think of emulating them.

pinyin: fēng yǔ tóng zhōu
translation: In the same boat through wind and rain.

pinyin: xué hǎi wú yá kǔ zuò zhōu
translation: The sea of learning has no end; hard work is the boat.

pinyin: jì lái zhī, zé ān zhī
translation: Since you are here, make the best of it.

chinese: 人往高处走，水往低处流
pinyin: rén wǎng gāo chù zǒu, shuǐ wǎng dī chù liú
translation: People climb high; water flows low.

pinyin: yǒu jiào wú lèi
translation: Education knows no class distinctions.

pinyin: mǎn zhāo sǔn, qiān shòu yì
translation: Arrogance invites loss; humility receives benefit.

pinyin: qiǎo fù nán wéi wú mǐ zhī chuī
translation: Even the cleverest wife cannot cook without rice.

pinyin: huà shé tiān zú
translation: Drawing a snake and adding legs. (Overdoing it.)

pinyin: huó dào lǎo, xué dào lǎo
translation: Live until old, learn until old.

pinyin: zhàn de gāo, kàn de yuǎn
translation: Stand tall, see far.

chinese: 天行健，君子以自强不息
pinyin: tiān xíng jiàn, jūn zǐ yǐ zì qiáng bù xī
translation: As heaven maintains vigor, a gentleman should constantly strive for self-perfection.

pinyin: xīn ān lǐ dé, hǎi kuò tiān kōng
translation: With a clear conscience, the sea is wide and the sky is vast.

chinese: 山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村
pinyin: shān zhòng shuǐ fù yí wú lù, liǔ àn huā míng yòu yī cūn
translation: Beyond the mountains and rivers, there is another village amid willows and flowers.

chinese: 少壮不努力，老大徒伤悲
pinyin: shào zhuàng bù nǔ lì, lǎo dà tú shāng bēi
translation: If one does not exert oneself in youth, one will regret it in old age.

pinyin: míng rén bù zuò àn shì
translation: An honest person does nothing in the dark.

chinese: 世上无难事，只怕有心人
pinyin: shì shàng wú nán shì, zhǐ pà yǒu xīn rén
translation: Nothing is impossible for a determined heart.

pinyin: tiān jiāng jiàng dà rèn yú sī rén yě
translation: Heaven is about to confer a great responsibility on this person.

chinese: 梦想还是要有的，万一实现了呢
pinyin: mèng xiǎng hái shì yào yǒu de, wàn yī shí xiàn le ne
translation: One must still have dreams — what if they come true?

pinyin: dī shuǐ zhī ēn, dāng yǒng quán xiāng bào
translation: Repay even a drop of kindness with a gushing spring.

pinyin: wèi yǔ chóu móu
translation: Repair the roof before the rain.

pinyin: yī míng jīng rén
translation: One cry startles everyone. (Sudden rise to fame.)

pinyin: shū shān yǒu lù qín wéi jìng
translation: In the mountain of books, diligence is the path.

pinyin: mǎ dào chéng gōng
translation: Success upon arrival.

pinyin: xué wú zhǐ jìng
translation: Learning has no boundaries.

pinyin: jiāng shān yì gǎi, běn xìng nán yí
translation: Rivers and mountains may change, but one's nature is hard to alter.

pinyin: tiān xià xīng wáng, pǐ fū yǒu zé
translation: Every person bears responsibility for the fate of the nation.

pinyin: lǎo dāng yì zhuàng
translation: Old but still vigorous.

pinyin: yǒu huā táng diàn bù zài dà
translation: A shop with flowers need not be large. (Quality over quantity.)

chinese: 人生自古谁无死，留取丹心照汗青
pinyin: rén shēng zì gǔ shuí wú sǐ, liú qǔ dān xīn zhào hàn qīng
translation: Let me leave a loyal heart to shine in history.

chinese: 孩子是父母的一面镜子
pinyin: hái zi shì fù mǔ de yī miàn jìng zi
translation: Children are a mirror of their parents.

pinyin: bù míng zé yǐ, yī míng jīng rén
translation: When it does not sing, it is silent; when it sings, it startles everyone.

pinyin: jūn zǐ jiān ér bù liú
translation: A gentleman is firm but not rigid.
